generated_oml:
instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled within BIM for environmental measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorData
]

instance OperationalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled within BIM for operational system measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalSensorData
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance OperationalSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OperationalSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental sensor readings from physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingEnabler, CustomAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational system measurements from physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingEnabler, CustomAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM model enriched with semantic definitions of Building Control System components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDETransformationEnabler
]

instance MDETransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for transforming enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalProcessOptimizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance RealTimeDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing real-time sensor data for monitoring and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for real-time command execution and synchronization between digital twin and physical actuators using Eclipse Hono protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables DecisionSupportService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for real-time data exchange and command synchronization between digital twin and physical assets using Ditto protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance CustomAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular extension point for integrating custom analytical services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems and environmental conditions for Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure performance and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OperationalProcessOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for energy efficiency and performance across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support for AECO stakeholders throughout design, construction, and operation phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionInsight, ActuatorControlAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for operational awareness"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interface for Facility Managers to interact with digital twin"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure performance and maintenance planning"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for operational process optimization"
]

instance DecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for strategic decision-making in AECO lifecycle"
]

instance ActuatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time command execution to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators modeled within BIM by Building Control Engineers for operational management"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building system under study for simulation, analysis, and optimization across lifecycle"
    base:contains BIMModel, EnvironmentalSensor, OperationalSensor, BuildingControlActuator, DTFramework
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized hub for multiple DT instances in modular architecture"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for building infrastructure operations are transmitted from the digital twin to Building Control Systems (BCS) through runtime interfaces, with bidirectional communication ensuring command validation, execution confirmation, and feedback. Facility Managers directly operate physical infrastructure via the DT interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points integrates custom services and analytics; the DT Framework serves as a central hub for bidirectional data exchange, coordinating roles such as Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers for holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to address BIM's static limitations. Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles are then applied to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable DT artifacts. Continuous real-time data exchange synchronizes the physical and digital twins, while interactive visualization enables monitoring and control. The modular architecture with standardized extension points supports integration of custom services and analytics, facilitating evolution to meet changing operational needs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure the accuracy of the digital twin's reflection of physical states, with verification processes ensuring alignment between modeled and real-world behaviors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connectivity employs a layered system architecture with Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for IoT data ingestion and digital twin management, enabling protocol translation and data routing between BIM models and physical assets across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework addresses the absence of standardized integration frameworks by leveraging AECO-specific BIM standards for modeling and Eclipse Ditto for IoT communication standards (e.g., MQTT). It implements standardized extension points to ensure interoperability and modular service integration, while a modeling methodology standardizes BIM semantics to bridge static representations with dynamic DT requirements."
]
